persona.name: New York
persona.bioMd:
New York works in illustrative oil: rich painterly color and visible brushwork with a bold, confident drawn hand. Not a flat print, a painting that still reads graphic.

The work holds a contradiction. A cold steel-and-concrete city lit by warm and electric neon life, grit and glamour in one frame. Where Amsterdam is soft and quiet, New York runs high-contrast and loud, though it still leaves the frame room to breathe.
persona.processMd: Each piece is built from a strong graphic idea, then painted in oil so the neon glows and the concrete has weight. Warm light against cold structure carries the tension; color stays bold but the composition is kept open, never crowded.

prompt.master: Illustrative oil painting, rich painterly color with a bold graphic illustrative hand, confident drawn shapes and visible brushwork, a hard steel-and-concrete city lit by warm and electric neon energy, the contradiction of grit and glamour in one frame, high-contrast and dynamic composition, generous negative space
prompt.negative: flat vector print, thin clean linework, pastel, low energy, photoreal, muddy blending, watercolor, busy clutter filling the frame, text, watermark

palette.description: Bone highlight is the light; steel blue is the cold structure; ink navy is the dark anchor. Neon magenta, neon cyan, and neon amber are electric light against the cold base. In oil these read as glowing light within a painted scene, not flat blocks. Use the neons sparingly, and keep open ground.

composition.subjectPlacement: dynamic and off-center with a strong diagonal and open ground
composition.notes: Bold illustrative oil: painterly brushwork with confident drawn shapes. Warm and electric neon light against cold concrete and steel. Keep energy high but leave open ground; do not fill the frame.
